cards.back: A software emulation of a physical machine, providing a self-contained environment for running operating systems and applications

cards.front: Hypervisor (also known as Virtual Machine Monitor(VMM))
cards.back: Software that creates and manages virtual machines, allowing multiple operating systems to run on a single physical host
A hypervisor that operates at the firmware level, below the operating system, and manages hardware resources directly
A hypervisor that runs on top of an existing operating system, providing a layer of abstraction between the OS and the virtual machines
A comprehensive virtualization platform for building and managing virtual infrastructure, including server, storage, and network resources
